feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Apps
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Apps Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Build Apps Google Chart Does Not Render Any More
entry.content:
Hi,

Our App uses the D3.js/Google chart module for rendering graphs, this worked fine for our app created in AppGyver. Has been exported/imported into SAP Build Apps and since then the graph rendering does not work anymore. Upgraded the DS3.js/Google chart module towards the latest 2.0.0 version but without success. Anyone encountered the same issue ?

Searched the WEB for a similar case, found one but no solution proposed.

Help would be welcome.

Many thanks,

Walter Verhoeven

entry.title: Getting error "Forbidden Correlation Id: 3041754d-8fda-4ca3-77ea-b2511c759bad" while creating Web an
entry.content:
• Error Message: "Forbidden Correlation Id: 3041754d-8fda-4ca3-77ea-b2511c759bad."
  • BTP Subscription: SAP Build Apps Trial (US10 region)
  • Trial Status: Active
  • Browser: Chrome, Edge (also tested in Incognito mode)
  • Tried Solutions:
    • Checked BTP Cockpit → SAP Build Apps Subscription is active
    • Ensured Role Collections (SAP Build Apps Admin/Developer) are assigned
    • Cleared browser cache & cookies

entry.title: Limit of data storage in Application backend created using SAP build apps.
entry.content:
Hi ,

Can anyone let me know how much data can we store in Application backend created using SAP build apps? and also can we increase or decrease the storage capacity.

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - Rest API config display issue
entry.content:
Hi, im just interested to know if this is a broader issue.  I noticed that i cannot click on any of the Rest API integrations and see their configuration. The firebase and OData ones work.  However my older REST API direct integration ones no longer allow me to click on them to update the configuration.   I noticed that there is a new format called "Universal REST API integration" which seems to work.   If i need to migrate my APIs to the new version - i cant set my configuration unfortunately.  Appreciate any help.

@Dan_Wroblewski  - wondering if the older API format is being depricated.

Old

New

entry.title: Web & Mobile App Development Option is not available in SAP Built Apps Under BTP Trial Account
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I was following below learning path for Web & Mobile Application Development through SAP Built App, but that option is not available as shown in exercise of the learning path. Below is the link.

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/develop-apps-with-sap-build-apps-using-drag-and-drop-simplicity/getting-acquainted-with-sap-build-apps 

Is that option has been removed from trial account or I'm doing something wrong. 

Any help would be much appreciated. 

Thank you all.

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - Trying to Generate code with help of Joule to import excel file
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am new to SAP BTP and learning SAP Build Code. I am trying to create simple page where user can select Excel file and upload the data to back end table. At same time show uploaded data into frontend table.
Is this code generation possible using Joule ?
I am using trial version of SAP BTP

Regards,
Priyanka

entry.title: Unable to format SAP build output coming from LLM
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am working on an copilot created using SAP Build apps which talks with SAP AI core instance to answer queries asked .

The app works perfectly fine but the outcome lacks formats and colors which we usually see when we ask similiar questions to other copilots or chatbots.

Please find attached my apps output and other copilots output .Can you help me how I can retain the format of the outcome of LLM and display it on my application?

SAP Build 

SAP AI Core

entry.title: Actions in SAP Build Process Automation -- Need to call $Batch in Action Task
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to implement a batch call in Build Process Automation using an Action Task. I have configured the destination in the BTP Cockpit and also created an Action Project in SAP Build.

When testing the Action Project independently, I am able to retrieve the expected data. However, when using it within a workflow, I am encountering the following error:

Action Identifier:
post_batch
Destination:
GET_DATA
Error Message:
Action '7a1f2496-6c0d-48ce-a724-9ca2651d8fab' failed with the following error:
'Action metadata not found in database for tenant f5a191b7-809f-4113-87fe-6b21da19d542, project us10.93112af8trial.getdatacall, version 1.0.3, action group b315b59d-bafd-3cbf-a4a2-79a0743dfac0, and action post_batch'.

Log ID:
fdc268b4-2c5c-439a-814b-802b67e-us10

I have also attached a screenshot of the configuration.
Please let me know how I can resolve this issue.

Destination Config Screenshot:

Action Config Screenshot:

 

BPA workflow Screenshot:

Thanks,

Parth

entry.title: SAP Build Apps Decimal Issue
entry.content:
Dear Experts ,

Field used for price input should format after input to localized decimal number.

As the value is given as Text preferred formula function would be Format_localized_decimal.

On binding this gives the error message of “This binding requires an inversible formula”.

See attached screenshot:

Thanks,

Vijay

entry.title: Configuring Only Necessary Permissions with Developer License in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi,
I'd like to know if, with the 'Sap Build Developer license', it's possible to configure only the necessary permissions for my app in SAP Build Apps — so that the generated .aab file includes only the permissions actually required by the app. My goal is to ensure compliance with Google Play’s guidelines, which emphasize requesting only permissions that are essential for app functionality.

Is this level of permission configuration supported with the Developer license?
Thanks in advance!

https://www.sap.com/products/technology-platform/build/pricing.html

entry.title: How to Generate a Dynamic URL for Approval Task in SAP Business Process Automation (SAP BPA)
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I'm working on a workflow using SAP Build Process Automation and need help with generating a dynamic task approval link that can be sent via email notification to the approver.

Objective:

  • Generate a dynamic URL for each task instance.

  • Send the URL via email template or script task.

  • Clicking the link should open the approval task directly in My Inbox or SAP Build Work Zone / Launchpad.

Thanks in advance,
Parshuram

entry.title: Has anyone successfully integrated SAP Document Information Extraction with SAP Build Apps?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm currently working on a prototype using SAP Build Apps and trying to integrate the SAP Document Information Extraction (DIE) API – ideally with a real template/schema and a full end-to-end process (upload → OCR → display/store).

Unfortunately, I’m stuck. Even though I have the service key set up and a destination configured, I can’t get the full integration working properly within SAP Build Apps (or using Visual Cloud Functions / Build Process Automation).

My questions to the community:

  1. Has anyone here successfully connected DIE to SAP Build Apps?

  2. Is there a step-by-step guide available somewhere (screenshots would be amazing)?

  3. Are there any specific things to consider with templates/schemas or the authentication flow?

I’d really appreciate any advice, example code, or experiences.


Happy to connect via DM as well if it’s easier!

Best regards,

entry.title: SAP Build Action: Error fetching BTP subaccount destinations for subscriber tenant context.
entry.content:
I'm trying to test an Action in SAP Build. However, when trying to select a Destination, I get the the following error:
 
Error fetching BTP subaccount destinations for subscriber tenant context.
This error could happen for the following reasons:
Correlation ID: xxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
 
This is happening for all Actions.

entry.title: Error while Enable Mobile services in SAP BTP Build Apps Trail account
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am using SAP BTP Build Apps trail account and created application.

As enable mobile service is mandatory before deploy android application I have tried to enable mobile service and getting below error.

I have contacted SAP Trail support team and they suggested to check Mobile service dashboard for error logs but I don't see any error logs. As SAP Trail support team suggested I am creating this question in forum. Please help with solution. Thanks in advance

entry.title: Difference in behavior of action call when called in debug mode vs unattended mode?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am facing the following issue on one particular action call.

Issue details:

1. Testing the action call directly on the action project works and provides the expected result.

2. Added the same action project as a dependency in an automation. Calling the action call via action groups. When executing this action group call in debug mode, provides the expected result.

3. Only when running the automation in unattended mode, the action call provides an unexpected result.

Already checked the following:

1. oData call on gateway server is working correctly.

2. Latest version is used for both manual and automated testing.

3. Same destination is used in debug and unattended mode.

4. Same data tested in both cases.

I am unsure of the direction I should next take to identify the issue.

Any direction or pointers would be much appreciated.

Best Regards,

Rohit

entry.title: Something Went wrong
entry.content: One of my pages does this, any idea why this happens, but all other pages function well.

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - Set App Variable
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have an app variable called 'Purchase Order Item' that is a list of objects. I have 2 pages ie. Item Details and Item Overview. Item Details page takes user inputs for an item and Item Overview page displays all the items as a list.

I have created a button 'Add Item' on the Item Details page so the item can be added to the Item Overview Page. In the logic canvas of the button, I have used 'Set App Variable' function to update my item list on Overview Page. This function is not appending to the existing items but rather replacing it. For example, if there is item 1 on Overview page and I try to append item 2 to it from Details page, it is replacing item 1 with item 2 rather than appending. Could you please suggest any ideas to resolve this?

Thank you. 

Kind Regards,

Praneetha

#SAPBuildApps

entry.title: how to connect ABAP cloud system with SAP build apps?
entry.content:
Can some one please guide us how to connect an ABAP cloud system/or S/4 hana cloud which is created as an instance in Free Tier BTP to a sap build apps (also free tier) ??

Even after entering all details we get errors of no authorization 

If want to try out real time scenarios like with data from SAP backend or sap abap cloud systems what are the steps to follow ? 

As even cloud connector needs a installation and need admin privileges ,isnt there a cloud way to connect to SAP backend system to BTP without installing new software on machine?

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - Set App Variable
entry.content:
When you click on the "Set App Variable" logic function, on the right panel, you would see "Variable name" and "Assigned Value". In the "Assigned value", you have to choose "Formula" option. A formula editor pop up shows up. You can use the WITH_ITEM formula for this case since you want to append an item to a list. The item should be of the same data type as the list elements.

For eg: Lets say you have a list1(list of objects) which contains the items displayed on the overview page and you want to add item2 to list1 on the click of a button, the formula you would use in the formula editor would be:

WITH_ITEM(appVars.list1, item2) -> change the list1, item2 according to your variable names

The Formula editor shows how WITH_ITEM should be used, on the right side with examples.

entry.title: Fetching the Count from OData service response
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I am building an application using SAP Build Apps, integrating it with SAP SuccessFactors Platform with OData services.

On a view, I turned on the Include total count feature from the Paging option, found on the Get Record Collection flow logic.

With this, I get the data from SAP SuccessFactor, in below format:
{
"d": {
"results": [ ... ],
"__count": "381"
}
}

Can anyone please help me understand, how can I use/bind the value coming in the field - __count , so that I can display the count of the records?

Regards,

Chandan
